channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [WFLA News Channel 8] JD and Usha Vance welcome a baby boy, the first child born to a sitting VP in more than 150 years
item.description: Vice President JD Vance and his wife, second lady Usha Vance, on Sunday announced the birth of their fourth child, the first born to a sitting vice president in more than 150 years.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 85-year-old driver dies after truck crashes into retention pond in Pinellas County: FHP
item.description: An 85-year-old man died after losing control of his pickup truck and crashing into a retention pond in Pinellas County on Sunday afternoon.

[WFLA News Channel 8] Spain wins the World Cup by beating Argentina 1-0 on Ferran Torres' goal in extra time
item.description: Spain substitute Ferran Torres scored in the 106th minute to give his team a 1-0 win over defending champion Argentina in the World Cup final on Sunday.

item.title: [WFLA News Channel 8] Spain wins the World Cup by beating Argentina 1-0 on Ferran Torres' goal in extra time
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — Spain substitute Ferran Torres scored in the 106th minute to give his team a 1-0 win over defending champion Argentina in the World Cup final on Sunday. Spain was absolutely dominant in terms of possession and shot attempts. Lionel Messi and Argentina found a way to hang on and force [...]

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Spain defeats Argentina 1-0 to win 2026 World Cup
item.description: Spain is your 2026 FIFA World Cup champions! 🏆 Ferran Torres scored in the 106th minute of extra time to defeat Argentina 1-0 and secure Spain's second World Cup title.

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Commercial fire breaks out on Combee Road in Lakeland: PCFR
item.description: Heavy flames tore through the roof of a commercial building on Combee Road in Lakeland Sunday morning, prompting a two-alarm response from Polk County Fire Rescue crews.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: tropical storm] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tropical Depression Two forms: What it means for your week
item.description: Tropical Depression Two formed off Florida’s west coast Sunday morning and is expected to become Tropical Storm Bertha within the next day or two as it continues to organize.

[WFLA News Channel 8] US announces another troop death as Israel warns Tehran's attacks are coming close
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — The United States announced another death of a service member as it launched more airstrikes at Iran on Sunday in response to the killing of U.S. troops, and Iran fired missiles toward Jordan that risked widening the conflict into neighboring Israel. Step by step, the U.S. and Iran have [...]

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] US service member killed in Iraq during 'controlled detonation' of Iranian drone, military says
item.description: One U.S. service member was killed and another wounded Saturday in northern Iraq during a "controlled detonation" of a downed Iranian attack drone, U.S. Central Command announced Sunday.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Dozens rally in downtown Tampa demanding justice after ICE shootings in Maine and Texas
item.description: Protesters gathered at Tampa City Hall Sunday to call for justice following two fatal ICE-related shootings this past week in Maine and Houston.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] One dead after car found inside pond in Pinellas Park: FHP
item.description: Officials pulled a truck out of a pond in Pinellas Park Sunday afternoon.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] ‘She never came out’: North Port couple mourns dog lost in camper fire
